Allegedly, a '''female Force-sensitive Yuuzhan Vong''' was to have been seduced and trained in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] in the aftermath of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Her existence and nature were described by her victim, Daye.

==Biography==
Most of the activities of this reported [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] were unknown, but it was said that she corrupted the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Daye Azur-Jamin]]. Hiding in the [[Cloak of the Sith/Legends|Cloak of the Sith]] region, she then managed to capture [[Kyle Katarn]] who was investigating rumors of a reemergence of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].<ref name="DFS" />

Kyle Katarn was rescued by a team put together by [[Jan Ors]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Jaden Korr]]. The [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] Daye revealed not only this alleged [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]], but also that she had a [[Sith Master/Legends|master]].<ref name="DFS" />

==Behind the scenes==
This alleged Force-using Vong was mentioned in an adventure seed in ''[[The Dark Forces Saga]]''. She has no official name but was dubbed '''Vongerella''' on the [[Jedi Council Forums]]. [[Abel G. Peña]] later used the name informally.<ref name="tfn1">{{JCFCite|url=posts/25208597|board=Literature|thread="Vader's Legacy": by Abel & Joe (SWI #?)|user=[[Abel G. Peña|Halagad_Ventor]]|date=2006-10-02|time=9:26 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801192655/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/vaders-legacy-by-abel-joe-swi.23237349/page-7}}</ref>

According to Peña, the ''[[Vader's Legacy]]'' article was going to include a backstory and name for her;<ref name="tfn2">{{JCFCite|url=posts/26306019|board=Literature|thread="Vader's Legacy": by Abel & Joe (SWI #?)|user=[[Abel G. Peña|Halagad_Ventor]]|date=2007-03-05|time=7:13 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801194721/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/vaders-legacy-by-abel-joe-swi.23237349/page-8}}</ref> the article, however, was canceled by [[Lucasfilm]].

She would have been the focus of a [[Insider Online Supplement|tie-in Hyperspace]] [[Faith Reborn: A Sith Destiny|short story]] that was cancelled alongside ''Vader's Legacy'' in [[2009]]''.'' This story would later be released on [[Joseph Bongiorno|Joe Bongiorno's]] [https://www.starwarstimeline.net/The%20Archives.htm website] in [[2025]].<ref name="FR">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarstimeline.net/The%20Archives.htm|text="Faith Reborn: A Sith Destiny"|author=[[Abel G. Peña|Abel G. Peña]]|work=[http://www.starwarstimeline.net Star Wars Expanded Universe Timeline]|archiveurl=https://archive.is/OkzqG}}</ref>
